title: Bartoline Brush Cleaner 1L, Effective Oil-Based Paint Remover for Brushes and Rollers, Water-Soluble Solvent with Conditioning Formula (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
EFFECTIVE OIL PAINT REMOVER: designed for cleaning brushes and rollers after use with oil-based paints; removes paint quickly, saving time and effort
CONDITIONING FORMULA: Contains water-soluble conditioners that help rejuvenate brushes and rollers, ensuring they last longer and remain in good condition for future use
EASY APPLICATION: Simply dip the brush or roller into the cleaner, work in the product, then rinse thoroughly with water to remove residual paint
FOR OIL-BASED PAINTS ONLY: Not suitable for cellulose or water-based paints; for users working with oil-based coatings

HOW TO USE: Use a non-plastic container like a paint kettle or jar to dip the brush or roller into Bartoline Brush Cleaner; rinse with water, dry with a clean cloth, and repeat if necessary for thorough cleaning
